title: Unforgettable Spicy Slovakian Lamb Stew
description: A spicy, gooey, romantic stew that brings Slovakian warmth to your table, halal-friendly for all diners.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add lamb pieces and brown on all sides, about 8 minutes.
Remove lamb and set aside; in the same pot, sauté onion, garlic, bell pepper, and carrot until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste and paprika sweet, cooking for 2 minutes to release aromas.
Return lamb to the pot, pour in diced tomatoes, cayenne pepper, thyme, and beef broth; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 60 minutes, checking occasionally and adding a splash of water if needed.
Season with salt and pepper, then simmer uncovered for 10 more minutes to thicken the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired, and enjoy the spicy, gooey romance of Slovakian cuisine.
